calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 18, 2022, is admitted to probate. Simon Chouldjian and Elizabeth Chouldjian are appointed as the Executors full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Continued To Mar-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vicken Papazian for Simon Chouldjian and Elizabeth Chouldjian, Petitioners (via Zoom).

Mr. Papazian provided an update on the progress of location potential heirs. Contact was made with the French consulate in Los Angeles, which yielded limited new information. A grandnephew of the deceased, residing in the UK, has been identified and contacted, but no responses have been received so far. Further efforts are underway to locate any additional heirs.

The court continued the matter to March 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow additional time to confirm the identities and contact details of all potential heirs.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
